name: WW Pumpkin Muffins (No Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Grease a muffin tin with cooking spray (e.g., Pam).
4. Divide the batter evenly among the cups of the prepared muffin tin.
5. Bake for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the muffins to cool in the tin for 5 minutes before removing them and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes 12 muffins. Each serving equals: 1 Bread, 1 Fruit, 1 Milk, 1 Protein, and 1 1/2 Vegetables exchanges (no fat). You can substitute Egg Beaters for the eggs and Equal for the Sweet & Low. Store in an airtight container and freeze if desired.
